biological_replicate: We have used HEK293 cells as there are approximately 15 U2 6kb tandem repeats per haploid human genome
technical_replicate: each ChIP sample was measured in triplicate by qPCR
experimental_design: CAPTURE has therefore expanded the repertoire of transcription and RNA processing factors
factor_value: CAPTURE enriched many factors expected to be associated with these human snRNA genes
number_of_fractions: No fractionation or pre-fractionation is described anywhere in the text
number_of_technical_replicates: each ChIP sample was measured in triplicate by qPCR
number_of_biological_replicates: Only one type of biological unit is mentioned
number_of_samples: 1 biological replicate described and no fractions mentioned
